  GpuSortExec: expr=[c_last_name@0 ASC, ss_ticket_number@4 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[c_last_name@6 as c_last_name, c_first_name@5 as c_first_name, ca_city@7 as ca_city, bought_city@1 as bought_city, ss_ticket_number@0 as ss_ticket_number, extended_price@2 as extended_price, extended_tax@4 as extended_tax, list_price@3 as list_price]
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
        GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(c_current_addr_sk@5, ca_address_sk@0)], filter=bought_city@0 != ca_city@1, projection=[0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 9]

                          GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_ticket_number, ss_customer_sk, ss_addr_sk, ca_city], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price), sum(store_sales.ss_ext_list_price), sum(store_sales.ss_ext_tax)]
